item.title: @steve.lacy zine, x rated HOLLYWOOD edition @theperfectmagazine Graphic Design: ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (2 medier)

@nadialeecohen

@steve.lacy zine, x rated HOLLYWOOD edition

@theperfectmagazine
Graphic Design: @karlajarvinen
Words @idea.ltd
Styling: @chloeandchenelle
Writer: David Owen @idea.ltd
Hair: @jakegallagherhair
Make-up: @lilly_keys
Set Design: @avavillafane
Movement: @ericvonchristison
1st Lighting Assistant: @davidlopezsuna
2nd Lighting Assistant: @soriano_gustavo_
Film: @bobbypavlovsky
Finishing: @kushtrimkunushevci & Theo at @artprocess.co 
Executive Producer: @carlota.rdv
Producer: @fabiencolas
Production manager: Richard Knickerbocker
Location Manager: Alison Dyer 
Colour Grade Film: @rickygausis
Film edit @g_scruton @nickels2dime
Casting: @tallulahbernardcasting
Talents: @steve.lacy, @tony_ward_official, @michaelvaccaro, Jon Patrick, @phillipricke, @brvceanderson
Digi-Tech: @studiocodycloud
Hair Assistance: @marykendallll
Prop Stylist: Emily Joe
Prop Assistant: Sabrina Nguyen, Drew Lee
Fashion Assistants: @sweetnsour, Sophia Bohmeiere 
Tailor: @alicehunanyan
Production Assistant: Boris Navaro
Production Assistant: Kabir Mogaji

Editor in Chief, Founder & Director: @kegrand
Publisher: @sorayalamari
Art Director: @grahamrounthwaite
Editorial Director: Murray Healy
Senior Contributing Editor: @paul_flynn
Digital Editor in Chief: @sidrounthwaite

Se slideshow på Instagram
